career_advice.title: Career Advice in
career_advice.description: Career nuances are often lost in translation. Pathlight speaks 40+ languages fluently, ensuring that cultural context and specific terminology are accurate, no matter where you are from.
career_advice.example_question: What are the best jobs for someone creative?
career_advice.example_answer: For a creative person, the options are vast. Based on your previous interests in technology, you could consider UX/UI Design or Frontend Development...

hero.description: Experience the future of mental health and career support. Choose a COUNSELOR that resonates with you and get real-time, judgment-free support for school, stress, and life.
hero.tap_to_chat: Tap call button to start chat

guides.title: Meet Your ICONS
guides.description: Mental health isn't one-size-fits-all. Our platform offers a range of AI personalities modeled after real counseling styles.

how_it_works.title: Support in 3 Simple Steps
how_it_works.description: We've made getting help as easy as sending a text or hopping on a call.
how_it_works.step1_desc: Sign up anonymously through your school portal or personal account.
how_it_works.step2_desc: Chat via text or have a live voice session with your AI avatar.
how_it_works.step3_desc: Receive personalized coping strategies and track your progress.

features.title: Complete Student Wellness Platform
features.description: Combining advanced avatar interaction with clinical safety protocols.
features.f1_desc: Face-to-face style interaction for a more human connection.
features.f2_desc: Real-time mood tracking to identify burnout early.
features.f3_desc: Detects severe risks and alerts human professionals instantly.
features.f4_desc: Tailored breathing exercises, journaling, and advice.
features.f5_desc: Connects students to existing school resources instantly.
features.f6_desc: Students can open up without fear of judgment or stigma.

impact.title: Why Schools Choose Pathlight
impact.description: We designed our platform to solve the most pressing challenges in student mental health today.
impact.stat1_label: 24/7 support means students get help whenever they need it, not just during school hours.
impact.stat2_label: One unified platform to support thousands of students simultaneously.
impact.stat3_label: Frees up human counselors to focus on critical cases requiring deep intervention.
impact.stat4_label: Modern avatar interface feels approachable and less clinical for Gen Z.

schools.title: Empower your counseling team with data.
schools.description: Pathlight doesn't replace counselors; it extends their reach. Get aggregated, privacy-compliant insights into the mental pulse of your student body to allocate resources where they are needed most.
schools.list1: Identify stress hotspots by grade or semester timing.
schools.list2: Early warning system for bullying trends.

cta.title: Ready to support your students?
cta.description: Join the movement transforming student mental health support with Pathlight's AI technology.

offerings.label: Offerings
offerings.title: Complete Career Ecosystem
offerings.item1_desc: Don't just guess what you need to learn. Pathlight scans thousands of job descriptions to identify exactly which skills you are missing for your dream role.
offerings.item2_desc: Choosing a major is daunting. We match your cognitive profile and interests with university courses that have the highest satisfaction rates for students like you.
offerings.item3_desc: Our AI generates ATS-friendly resumes tailored to specific job openings and suggests projects to build a portfolio that stands out.

footer.description: Empowering the next generation with accessible, safe, and intelligent mental health support.
footer.rights_reserved: Pathlight AI Inc. All rights reserved.

dashboard.subtitle: Choose your AI counselor and start a personalized session.
dashboard.available_desc: Connect with your AI counselor anytime, day or night
dashboard.personalized_desc: Tailored support based on your unique needs

auth.join_today: Join Pathlight today and start your journey.
auth.enter_details: Please enter your details to sign in.
auth.transform_school: Transform your school's mental health support.
auth.student_access: Get instant access to AI counselors, personalized tools, and a supportive community.
auth.school_access: Join a network of forward-thinking schools prioritizing student well-being with advanced technology.
auth.personal_icon: Your personal ICON to mental wellness.
auth.empower_school: Empower your school with data-driven insights.
auth.join_thousands: Join thousands of students using Pathlight to navigate school, stress, and life with confidence.
auth.monitor_wellbeing: Monitor student well-being trends, manage resources, and ensure no student falls through the cracks.
auth.forgot_password_desc: Don't worry! Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
auth.email_sent_desc: We've sent a password reset link to {{email}}. If you don't see it, please check your spam folder.
auth.reset_password_desc: Please enter your new password below.
auth.password_reset_success: Password reset successfully! You can now sign in.
